title: RGB Protocol
description: RGB is a client-side-validated smart-contract protocol for Bitcoin and Lightning. It keeps contract state and validation data off-chain, anchors commitments to Bitcoin transaction outputs, and lets participants validate the asset history they receive without requiring Bitcoin consensus changes.

resources.title: RGB Documentation
resources.notes: Official documentation for RGB concepts, standards, contracts, and integration.

resources.title: RGB Protocol Repository
resources.notes: Reference implementation and wallet/runtime integration code.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Background for Bitcoin transactions, commitments, UTXOs, and application-layer protocols.
